evidences.title: Binance Historical Tick Data (1 second) for a specific date range and ...
evidences.content: Optimus Prime's user avatar ## 1 Answer 1 Binance provides some of its historical trading data on the `binance.vision` domain. Specifically, the 1 second klines for BTCUSDT pair can be found here: `binance.vision` Here's a sample bash script that downloads and unpacks the raw data for the whole month: `#!/bin/bash for i in $(seq -f "%02g" 1 31) # zero-padded days 01, 02, 03, ... 31 do # month of july 2023, day number is the `i` variable archiveName="BTCUSDT-1s-2023-07-${i}.zip" # download the .zip, extract it (saves .csv), and remove the .zip wget " && unzip "./${archiveName}" && rm "./${archiveName}" done` As mentioned in their GitHub readme, each of the the `.csv` lines contains the following field values: `.csv` [...] `.csv` | Open time | Open | High | Low | Close | Volume | Close time | Quote asset volume | Number of trades | Taker buy base asset volume | Taker buy quote asset volume | Ignore | --- --- --- --- --- --- | So for example, the file `BTCUSDT-1s-2023-07-01.csv` containing this first line `BTCUSDT-1s-2023-07-01.csv` `1688169600000,30471.99000000,30472.00000000,30471.99000000,30472.00000000,0.54114000,1688169600999,16489.61790060,31,0.52320000,15942.95040000,0` enab...

evidences.content: Historical Market Data We've made Candlestick, Trade, and AggTrade data for all pairs available for download. What Data Is Available We provide data at daily and monthly intervals. Data for a day is uploaded the following day, and we begin to upload data for a month at the beginning of the following month. Data Products Open API ## Frequently Asked Questions Candlestick Also known as k-line, is distinguished by its open time and supports multiple intervals for analysis and interpretation. evidences.title: ET to UTC Converter - Time.now
evidences.content: Time Difference: UTC is 5 hours ahead of EST (winter) and 4 hours ahead of EDT (summer). The difference changes twice yearly with daylight saving transitions. #### Daylight Saving Time Impact Winter Period (EST): From first Sunday in November to second Sunday in March, ET is UTC-5, making UTC 5 hours ahead Summer Period (EDT): From second Sunday in March to first Sunday in November, ET is UTC-4, making UTC 4 hours ahead UTC Stability: UTC never changes and remains constant year-round, making it ideal for international coordination and technical applications #### Common Conversion Examples Business Hours (Winter) EST 9:00 AM → UTC 2:00 PM EST 5:00 PM → UTC 10:00 PM 5-hour difference during winter Business Hours (Summer) EDT 9:00 AM → UTC 1:00 PM EDT 5:00 PM → UTC 9:00 PM [...] #### What is ET to UTC Conversion? ET to UTC conversion helps you translate time between Eastern Time and Coordinated Universal Time. ET encompasses both EST (UTC-5) and EDT (UTC-4) used on the U.S. East Coast. UTC is the global time standard that never changes and serves as the reference for all world timezones. The time difference varies between 4-5 hours. #### Time Zone Information Eastern Time (ET): Gen...

evidences.title: EST to UTC Converter: Convert Eastern Standard Time to Coordinated Universal Time (Free)
evidences.content: Based International Air Transport Association (IATA) timezone codes. Time zones use hours and minutes offset from Coordinated Universal Time (UTC), most a whole number of hours, a few are offset by 30 or 45 minutes. Eastern Standard Time (EST) is UTC-5:00, and Eastern Daylight Time (EDT) is UTC-4:00, this time zone is called Eastern Time Zone (ET) in the United States, parts of eastern Canada, Mexico, Panama and the Caribbean Islands. Coordinated Universal Time (UTC) is the primary time standard now, time zones around the world are expressed using offsets from UTC, UTC offset is the difference in hours and minutes from UTC, a time zone can be determined by adding or subtracting the number of UTC offset. [...] Converter supports daylight saving time (DST) or summer time, if the target location is currently using DST time zone, converter will automatically calculate and display local summer time. evidences.title: EST to UTC conversion - World Clock

Most locations are observing Eastern Daylight Time (EDT). Maybe you should check the difference between Eastern Time (EDT) and Coordinated Universal Time (UTC) instead. evidences.content: ### What are the national holidays in the EST time zone? National holidays: New Year's Day: Celebrated on January 1st, marking the start of the new year. Independence Day: Observed on July 4th, with parades, fireworks, and celebrations throughout the region. Labor Day: Celebrated on the first Monday in September, honoring American workers and their contributions. Thanksgiving Day: Observed on the fourth Thursday in November, a major holiday for family gatherings and feasting. Christmas Day: Celebrated on December 25th, marked by family gatherings, feasts, and festive celebrations. ### What is some local trivia or geography about the EST region? [...] ### What is the difference between EST and EDT? EDT (Eastern Daylight Time) is used during Daylight Saving time and is UTC-4 hours. EST (Eastern Standard Time) is used outside of Daylight Saving Time and is UTC-5 hours. ### What are some major industries in the EST time zone?
